description: Style NoteEnjoy that splash in the pool in the club or in the cool neighbourhood pool. Product DetailsThis 1 piece swimsuit is perfectly designed for recreational swimmers. A comfortable clothing for swimming, water polo, diving, surfing, water boarding and even sun bathing. Rinse with clean water and leave until dry after use. Store in dry place. Composition 1. 82% polyamide, 18% elastane2. In-built inner wear support provided3. Contains elastolefin for maximum durability
